rag_rules: Fix unresolved references or invalid expressions before adding new AGREE clauses.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference valid types and identifiers present in the AADL model.
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `const`, `eq`, `ass`, and `gua` keywords with proper type declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not reference undefined or mismatched types in AGREE expressions.
